title: thelypteris subelata
intro: Thelypteris subelata, also known as the lesser sword fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may be beneficial in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Thelypteris subelata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential interactions with other medications.
